title: ctenitis elata
intro: Ctenitis elata, also known as the Maidenhair Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate fever. Ctenitis elata has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and digestive problems, and its health benefits include antioxidant and anti-bacterial properties. The herbal preparation of Ctenitis elata typically involves making a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
